Julia K. Quinn of Christy & Keith, Telephone (510) 788-4898, appearing for Plaintiff Cora Isabella Vera Keith; (Plaintiff's Counsel arrived to court after this matter was heard and after order was signed, Counsel arrived to court at 9:20 a.m.);

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Verified Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages; Form Interrogatories (Set One); Request For Production Of Documents (Set One); And Request For Monetary Sanctions

Granted. No Opposition filed. Order is signed.

*After hearing and the order is signed, Plaintiffs counsel appeared at court at 9:20 a.m. Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz was notifed on the bench of the late appearance of counsel. The matter is recalled at 10:20 a.m.*

The motion is Granted and the order is modified. Plaintiff is ordered to respond, without objections, to CCSF's Request for statement of Damages, Form Interrogatories (set one and Reqeust for production of Documents (set one) within forty-five days of this order. Request for monetary sanctions is Granted in the amount of $1,380.00. Plaintiff is ordered to pay sanctions of $1,380.00 within forty five days.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
